posts.author: OpenAIDevs
posts.title: Agent workflows got even faster. You can spin up containers for skills, shell and code interpreter about 10x faster. We added a container pool to the Responses API, so requests can reuse warm infrastructure instead of creating a full container creation each session. https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/tools-shell#hosted-shell-quickstart
posts.summary: Agent workflows got even faster. You can spin up containers for skills, shell and code interpreter about 10x faster. posts.author: GoogleDeepMind
posts.title: Pinned: How do we measure progress toward AGI? It takes a village – and a bit of healthy competition. 🛠️ We’re launching a global hackathon with @Kaggle to build new cognitive evaluations for AI. With $200k in prizes up for grabs, help us put our framework to the test. Join the challenge → https://goo.gle/4uqOVKK
posts.summary: How do we measure progress toward AGI? It takes a village – and a bit of healthy competition. 🛠️ We’re launching a global hackathon with @Kaggle to build new cognitive evaluations for AI. With $200k in prizes up for grabs, help us put our framework to the test. Join the challenge → goo.gle/4uqOVKK

posts.author: MistralAI
posts.title: Today, we’re introducing Forge, a system for enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in their proprietary knowledge. 🌎 Forge bridges the gap between generic AI and enterprise-specific needs. Instead of relying on broad, public data, organizations can train models that understand their internal context embedded within systems, workflows, and policies, aligning AI with their unique operations. We have already partnered with world-leading organizations, like ASML, DSO National Laboratories Singapore, Ericsson, European Space Agency, Home Team Science and Technology Agency (HTX) Singapore and Reply to train models on the proprietary data that powers their most complex systems and future-defining technologies.
posts.summary: Today, we’re introducing Forge, a system for enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in their proprietary knowledge. 🌎 Forge bridges the gap between generic AI and enterprise-specific needs. Instead of relying on broad, public data, organizations can train models that understand their internal context embedded within systems, workflows, and policies, aligning AI with their unique operations. We have already partnered with world-leading organizations, like ASML, DSO National Laboratories Singapore, Ericsson, European Space Agency, Home Team Science and Technology Agency (HTX) Singapore and Reply to train models on the proprietary data that powers their most complex systems and future-defining technologies. Video

posts.title: 🚀Announcing a strategic partnership with NVIDIA to co-develop frontier open-source AI models, combining Mistral AI’s frontier model architecture and full-stack AI offering with NVIDIA’s leading compute infrastructure and development tools.
posts.summary: 🚀Announcing a strategic partnership with NVIDIA to co-develop frontier open-source AI models, combining Mistral AI’s frontier model architecture and full-stack AI offering with NVIDIA’s leading compute infrastructure and development tools.

posts.author: cohere
posts.title: Our team had a great week in San Jose at @NVIDIAGTC ! Cohere leaders and technical staff delivered talks across the event, covering hardware efficiency, enterprise-grade automation, and innovation across the stack. Our CEO, @aidangomez, also joined the GTC live stage to discuss the exciting possibilities for enterprise customers, the barriers to deploying enterprise technology into global economies, and what surprised him most about the evolution of AI adoption. It was great connecting with our customers and partners, including @Dell, @Microsoft, @Oracle, and @CoreWeave, as well as the many other brilliant minds across the ecosystem who are shaping the exciting future of AI. #NVIDIAGTC
posts.summary: Our team had a great week in San Jose at @NVIDIAGTC ! Cohere leaders and technical staff delivered talks across the event, covering hardware efficiency, enterprise-grade automation, and innovation across the stack. Our CEO, @aidangomez , also joined the GTC live stage to discuss the exciting possibilities for enterprise customers, the barriers to deploying enterprise technology into global economies, and what surprised him most about the evolution of AI adoption. It was great connecting with our customers and partners, including @Dell , @Microsoft , @Oracle , and @CoreWeave , as well as the many other brilliant minds across the ecosystem who are shaping the exciting future of AI. #NVIDIAGTC

posts.author: cohere
posts.title: Today at GTC, we announced that we’re building NVIDIA ecosystem-native models and an optimized instance of our agentic North platform to meet the growing demand for secure, privately deployed AI systems alongside @nvidia. These custom models will be optimized for NVIDIA’s latest architecture and software ecosystem, including NVIDIA DGX Spark – bringing a high-performance, locally run enterprise AI workstation to Spark owners and customers. Learn more on our blog, and visit us at the GTC South Market Lot, Booth #7027: https://lnkd.in/e-48MbTG #NVIDIAGTC
posts.summary: Today at GTC, we announced that we’re building NVIDIA ecosystem-native models and an optimized instance of our agentic North platform to meet the growing demand for secure, privately deployed AI systems alongside @nvidia . These custom models will be optimized for NVIDIA’s latest architecture and software ecosystem, including NVIDIA DGX Spark – bringing a high-performance, locally run enterprise AI workstation to Spark owners and customers. Learn more on our blog, and visit us at the GTC South Market Lot, Booth #7027: lnkd.in/e-48MbTG #NVIDIAGTC

posts.author: perplexity_ai
posts.title: Computer can now take full control of Comet to complete tasks. When you’re in Comet, Computer spins up a browser agent that can access any site or logged‑in app with your permission, without the need for connectors or MCPs. Available to all Computer users on Comet.
posts.summary: Computer can now take full control of Comet to complete tasks. When you’re in Comet, Computer spins up a browser agent that can access any site or logged‑in app with your permission, without the need for connectors or MCPs. Available to all Computer users on Comet. Video

posts.title: Computer is now on Android.
posts.summary: Computer is now on Android. Video Perplexity (@perplexity_ai) Perplexity Computer is now on mobile. Start any task on any device. Manage Computer from your phone or desktop with cross-device synchronization. Available now for iOS in the Perplexity app. Coming soon to Android. Video — https://nitter.net/perplexity_ai/status/2032494752642568417#m

posts.title: Join us in New York on April 2 for a Runway Characters Hackathon. In this workshop you'll learn how to create your own custom real-time video agents and bring them directly into your apps, websites, products and experiences. Register now at the link below.

posts.author: runwayml
posts.title: Introducing Runway's Big Ad Contest For Products That Don't Exist. Your chance to make any ad you can imagine for up to $100K in cash prizes. No client notes. No producers saying no. Just 7 briefs to choose from and 2 weeks to make your wildest concepts come to life. Big ideas win big. Learn more and get started at the link below.
posts.summary: Introducing Runway's Big Ad Contest For Products That Don't Exist. Your chance to make any ad you can imagine for up to $100K in cash prizes. No client notes. No producers saying no. Just 7 briefs to choose from and 2 weeks to make your wildest concepts come to life. Big ideas win big. Learn more and get started at the link below. Video

posts.author: runwayml
posts.title: A breakthrough in real-time video generation. As a research preview developed with @NVIDIA and shared at @NVIDIAGTC this week, we trained a new real-time video model running on Vera Rubin. HD videos generate instantly, with time-to-first-frame under 100ms. Unlocking an entirely new creative paradigm and bolstering the foundations of our General World Model, GWM-1. Real-time generation opens a fundamentally different design space for video models and world simulation. We're investing in co-designing our models alongside advances in hardware to keep pushing this frontier.
posts.summary: A breakthrough in real-time video generation. As a research preview developed with @NVIDIA and shared at @NVIDIAGTC this week, we trained a new real-time video model running on Vera Rubin. HD videos generate instantly, with time-to-first-frame under 100ms. Unlocking an entirely new creative paradigm and bolstering the foundations of our General World Model, GWM-1. Real-time generation opens a fundamentally different design space for video models and world simulation. We're investing in co-designing our models alongside advances in hardware to keep pushing this frontier. Video

posts.title: Introducing Runway's Big Ad Contest For Products That Don't Exist. Your chance to make any ad you can imagine for up to $100K in cash prizes. No client notes. No producers saying no. Just 7 briefs to choose from and 2 weeks to make your wildest concepts come to life. Big ideas win big. Learn more and get started at the link below.

posts.author: runwayml
posts.title: A breakthrough in real-time video generation. As a research preview developed with @NVIDIA and shared at @NVIDIAGTC this week, we trained a new real-time video model running on Vera Rubin. HD videos generate instantly, with time-to-first-frame under 100ms. Unlocking an entirely new creative paradigm and bolstering the foundations of our General World Model, GWM-1. Real-time generation opens a fundamentally different design space for video models and world simulation. We're investing in co-designing our models alongside advances in hardware to keep pushing this frontier.
